quranicRelevance: Forbidding evil (Nahy), stopping/refraining, and intellect (Nuha - because it restrains/forbids foolishness).

keyDerivations.meaning: To forbid, prohibit, prevent, or restrain
To refrain, stop, cease, or finish

figurativeOrRareUsages: لأُولِي النُّهَى: For possessors of intellect/reason (those whose intellect restrains them from sin).
سِدْرَةِ المُنْتَهَى (53:14): The Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary.
discardedNoise: Camels drinking until they are fully satisfied (نهي).
Water accumulating at the end of a valley.
summaryEn: The root denotes restraint and limits, linking moral prohibition (Nahy) with human intellect (Nuha) and the final eschatological limit (Muntaha).
summaryAr: يدل هذا الجذر على المنع والحدود، رابطاً النهي الأخلاقي (نهي) بالعقل البشري (نهى) والمنتهى الأخير والمصير.
rawText: اِنْتَهَى عَنْهُ 8 , and 🡻تَنَاهَى, He refrained, abstained, or desisted, from it, as forbidden; left, relinquished, or forsook it. (S, Msb.) See an ex. of the latter voce سَوَادٌ. === اِنْتَهَى إِلَيْهِ It ultimately reached, or extended, and sometimes it so pertained, to him, or it: in the latter sense said of authority and the like: and simply, it reached to him, or it. === اِنْتَهَى إِلَيْهِ الخَبَرُ, and 🡻تَنَاهَى, The information, or news, reached him. (S.) === اِنْتَهَى إِلَى مَوْضِعٍ He came at last, or ultimately, to a place. So I have rendered it in explaining أَفْضَى. === اِنْتَهَى It (a thing, or an affair,) attained the utmost possible point, or degree. (Msb.) It (fruit, and the like) attained its utmost state of growth. === اِنْتَهَى It is ended: a word put to mark the end of a quotation. تَنَاْهَىَ 6 see 8. رَكِبَ النَّهْىَ He did that which he was forbidden to do. (TA in art. ردع.) مُنْتَهًى A place to which a person or thing comes at last; a journey's end; a goal; a destination, or place or state to which a person or thing is appointed to come; an end; an ultimate object: see an ex. in a verse near the end of art. ب. See نِهَايَةٌ. === سِدْرَةُ المُنْتَهَى (Kur liii. 14) The lote-tree of the ultimate point of access, in the Seventh Heaven: see سدر. نَاهِيكَ بِأَخِينَا [A person sufficing thee is our brother]: the ب is added to denote emphatic praise. (Fr in TA, art. بِ.) See also Har, p. 28, and, more particularly, p. 91. نَهَاهُ عَنْهُ 1 He forbade him it. === لَاتُسْهَى وَلَا تُنْهَى: see art. سهى, in two places. نَهُوٌّ is anomalous, (TA,) like بَغُوٌّ. نِهَايَةٌ The utmost possible point, or degree: (Msb:) and the ultimate point, or element, to which a thing can be reduced or resolved: its utmost point or particular: as also 🡻مَنْتَهًى. See فَصٌّ. === نِهَايَةٌ فِى السَّخَآءِ [Extreme in bounty, or munificence]. (O and K, voce مَسْحَلٌ.)
